description: < b> Style Note< /b> These jeans from peter england are the a pair that you would want to wear when you feel like standing out. Titled the Bin jeans, they have meticulously hand crafted criss-cross impressions which are inspired by the tea baskets of Darjeeling. Sport a look that will be envied by all when you pair these jeans with your favourite snug white tee and sports shoes. < b> Product Details< /b> Blue jeans, has a washed look, low waist, buttoned and zippered closure, belt loops around the waist, brand patch on the waist at the back, two insert pockets in front with a coin pocket above the right pocket and two patch pockets at the back with stitched detail and a crumpled look< b> Material and Care< /b> 100% cottonWash separatelyDo not bleachDrip dry Warm iron< b> Size and Fit< /b> Slim fit, Low waistThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
